title: Secondary air injection system with flame retarding member
abstract: The present invention relates to a secondary air injection (SAI) system (102) for an engine (100). The SAI system (102) comprising of one or more flame retarding member (201), wherein said flame retarding member (201) is configured to eliminate the entering of the flames from one or more exhaust port (101B) of the engine (100) into one or more SAI tube (102B). This improves the durability of the secondary air injection system (102).
claims: Claims We Claim: 1. A secondary air injection (SAI) system (102) for an engine (100), said SAI system (102) comprising: one or more cylinder head (102), said cylinder head (102) configured to have one or more secondary air injection (SAI) port (101D); One or more flame retarding member (201), said flame retarding member (201) is disposed in said SAI port (101D). 2. The secondary air injection (SAI) system (102) for an engine (100), said SAI system (102) as claimed in claim 1, wherein cylinder head (102) is operatively connected to one or more secondary air injection (SAI) tube (102B), said SAI tube (102B) comprising of one or more secondary air injection (SAI) metallic tube (102BA) and one or more secondary air injection (SAI) elastomer hose (102BB). 3. A secondary air injection (SAI) system (102) for an engine (100), said SAI system (102) comprising: one or more cylinder head (102), said cylinder head (102) configured to have one or more secondary air injection (SAI) port (101D); One or more flame retarding member (201), said flame retarding member (201) is placed in the passageway of a SAI metallic tube (102BA). 4. The secondary air injection (SAI) system (102) for an engine (100), said SAI system (102) as claimed in claim 2 or claim 3, wherein said SAI metallic tube (102BA) is operatively connected to said cylinder head (102). 5. The secondary air injection (SAI) system (102) for an engine (100) as claimed in claim 1 or claim 3, wherein said SAI port (101D) is configured to have one or more counterbore (101C), said counterbore (101C) is adapted to receive a portion of said SAI metallic tube (102BA). 6. The secondary air injection (SAI) system (102) for an engine (100) as claimed in claim 5, wherein said flame retarding member (201) is disposed in said counterbore (101 C) upstream of a front end (102BAA) of said SAI metallic tube (102BA). 7. The secondary air injection (SAI) system (102) for an engine (100) as claimed in claim 1 or claim 3, wherein said flame retarding member (201) configured to have a peripheral portion (201B) and plurality of opening (201 A) radiating outwardly from its center. 8. The secondary air injection (SAI) system (102) for an engine (100) as claimed in claim 7, wherein said openings (201A) are four in number. 9. The secondary air injection (SAI) system (102) for an engine (100) as claimed in claim 1 or claim 3, wherein cross sectional area of said flame retarding member (201) is substantially more than cross sectional area of said SAI metallic tube (102BA) such that the required cross sectional area for secondary air intake is maintained as that of said SAI metallic tube (102BA). 10. The secondary air injection (SAI) system (102) for an engine (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein said flame retarding member (201) is integrated with a front end portion (102BAA) of the SAI metallic tube (102BA).
